name: Bill's Pizza Crust
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix until a mass is formed.
2. Add 3 tablespoons Olive Oil and knead the dough.
3. Let it rise to triple its size.
4. Knead again and let it rise once more to triple its size.
5. Cut into half.
6. Roll out every two minutes until expanded to 14 inches.
7. Add toppings and bake at 450°F for 12-15 minutes.
Bill was attempting to find the perfect pizza crust. He developed this over a period of time through trial and error. This should produce a thin, firm crust for your pizza.
